name: Mailing Lists | openEuler
description: Discuss and stay updated on Linux, cloud computing, and open source innovation through our mailing lists.

about.name: Mailing Lists
about.description: Subscribe to SIG mailing lists to discuss and collaborate on Linux, cloud computing, and open source innovation within the openEuler community.

name: How to Subscribe to an openEuler SIG Mailing List
description: Follow these steps to subscribe to a Special Interest Group (SIG) mailing list on openEuler.

step.name: Select Your SIG
step.text: Choose the Special Interest Group (SIG) you want to subscribe to from the available mailing lists.

step.name: Enter Details
step.text: Provide your subscription details including your email address.

step.name: Review & Confirm
step.text: Review your subscription information and confirm your request.

step.name: You're Subscribed!
step.text: Your subscription is complete. You will receive mailing list updates from the selected SIG.
